name: Ko-fi
description: Ko-fi creator-commerce webhook integration for payment, donation, shop order, membership, and commission notifications. Ko-fi does not expose a full public catalog/product API for agents to create products or upload audio files.

credential_fields.name: verificationToken
credential_fields.label: Verification Token
credential_fields.description: Optional Ko-fi verification token used to match incoming webhook payloads.

registration.manual_setup: Copy the Apteva webhook URL into Ko-fi's API/Webhooks settings. Ko-fi webhook setup is manual; this integration stores the optional verification token for matching incoming payment payloads.

events.name: payment
events.description: A Ko-fi payment notification such as donation, membership, shop order, or commission, depending on enabled Ko-fi features.
